personal.name: Mohammad Sheriff
personal.title: Senior Data Scientist | AI/ML Engineer
personal.heroTagline: I build intelligent AI systems & solve complex problems.
personal.heroDescription: I'm a Senior Data Scientist & AI/ML Engineer with 6+ years of experience building enterprise-grade AI applications, deploying LLMs, and designing scalable ML systems. Passionate about Generative AI, NLP, and transforming business challenges into data-driven solutions.

about: Hello! I'm Mohammad Sheriff, a Senior Data Scientist & AI/ML Engineer based in Hyderabad/Bangalore, India. I specialize in transforming complex business challenges into scalable, data-driven solutions. Currently working at ValueLabs as a Senior Data Scientist.

I have successfully designed and deployed enterprise-grade AI applications that enhanced customer experience, reduced customer churn by 40%, and generated significant revenue growth through intelligent automation and advanced analytics.

With an M.Tech in Data Science & Engineering from BITS Pilani, I combine strong academic foundations with hands-on expertise in Generative AI, LLMs, RAG, MLOps, and cloud-based AI solutions. I thrive at the intersection of innovation, research, and business impact.

projects.name: Drift Taxonomy Engine
projects.description: Production-grade MLOps platform for automated drift detection, classification, and response in fraud detection models. Features multi-type drift detection (covariate, concept, pipeline, target), SHAP explainability, auto-retrain pipeline, and real-time Streamlit dashboard with Docker deployment.

projects.name: Authentica — AI Content Detection
projects.description: Published PyPI package for AI content authenticity detection. Detects C2PA content credentials, invisible watermarks (DWT, DCT, FFT), and image forensics anomalies (ELA, noise analysis, GAN artifacts). Inspired by ExifTool's philosophy with a pure Python implementation.

projects.name: S.H.A.D.Y — Smart Detection with YOLO
projects.description: Real-time multi-detection system using YOLOv4 for object detection, fall detection, social distancing monitoring, and vehicle crash detection from CCTV cameras. Includes automated email alerts and a Flask-based web deployment with GPU acceleration.

projects.name: Document Tampering Detection
projects.description: AI-powered system for detecting documents tampered by editing tools or generated by AI. Uses metadata analysis, forensic techniques, and machine learning to identify forgeries in document images.

projects.name: RiffpayAI — Medical Billing Intelligence
projects.description: AI-powered medical billing platform with MCP integration. Uses LLM calls for intelligent document processing, automated billing code extraction, and smart recommendations for healthcare providers.

projects.name: Multi-Agent Flight Booking AI
projects.description: Multi-agent AI system for automated flight booking and travel planning. Features intelligent agent orchestration, real-time flight search, and conversational booking flow using modern LLM architecture.

projects.name: Research Paper Simplifier AI
projects.description: AI tool that simplifies complex research papers into digestible summaries. Dockerized application with structured backend for PDF parsing, LLM-based summarization, and interactive Q&A on academic content.

projects.name: End-to-End Medical Chatbot
projects.description: Production-ready medical chatbot using OpenAI GPT for intelligent health-related Q&A. Features knowledge base integration, context-aware responses, and enterprise deployment pipeline.

bullets: Built a RAG-based document processing system using Qdrant vector DB, AWS infrastructure, GPT 5.4, and multi-agent architecture for intelligent enterprise knowledge extraction at scale.
Developed an image document processing pipeline using AWS Textract services with Adapter and Lambda for extracting structured data from documents into a knowledge base.
Implemented document forgery detection using metadata analysis with ExifTool approach and deployed it using passive forensic techniques for fraud prevention.
Created synthetic training data on existing document images using Smooth Blur Patch Fill technique to augment datasets for improved model accuracy.
Built clustering models to group similar documents and designed a custom table extraction model using Transformer architecture in PyTorch, integrated into the production pipeline.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver AI solutions driving measurable business outcomes and revenue growth.
Developed and deployed ML models that reduced customer churn by 40%, significantly improving customer retention metrics.
Built end-to-end NLP pipelines for sentiment analysis, text classification, and named entity recognition serving enterprise clients.
Designed scalable data pipelines processing millions of records daily using cloud-based architectures.
Led AI-driven analytics initiatives generating actionable insights for business stakeholders across multiple domains.
Developed and deployed ML models for predictive analytics and classification tasks across multiple enterprise clients.
Built end-to-end NLP pipelines for sentiment analysis, text classification, and named entity recognition.
Designed scalable data pipelines processing millions of records daily using cloud-based architectures.
Led AI-driven analytics initiatives generating actionable insights for business stakeholders across multiple domains.

contact.heading: Get In Touch
contact.description: I'm currently open to new opportunities — especially FAANG and top-tier AI/ML roles. Whether you have a question, a collaboration idea, or just want to connect, my inbox is always open.
